name: funpack
description: Author deterministic, agent-first games in the funpack language. Skills, slash commands, and agents that teach funpack syntax, the engine.* stdlib, the things/behaviors/pipelines model, and the fixed-point determinism contract.

plugins.name: funpack
plugins.description: Write funpack games: language syntax & semantics, the engine.* API, the things/behaviors/pipelines runtime model, project layout, the asset/level/tilemap/model/UI/audio bake pipelines, and the determinism gates — plus commands to scaffold, build, test, run, and query a game, and author/reviewer agents.
